items.summary: Extend the backend profile role model to support three roles: Student (read-only), Student Coordinator (requires faculty verification before gaining booking permissions), and Faculty (full permissions).

Add backend persistence and APIs for the Student Coordinator faculty-verification workflow: allow Student Coordinators to be in an unverified state after registration, allow Faculty to list pending verification requests, and allow Faculty to approve or reject verification requests.

Update backend authorization enforcement so that only Faculty and verified Student Coordinators can create or cancel bookings; Students and unverified Student Coordinators must be blocked from all booking mutations (requestBooking, cancelBooking, cancelBookings) while still being allowed to read schedules and event details.

Update the registration UI to let users select among Student, Student Coordinator, and Faculty, and ensure user-facing text clearly explains that Student Coordinators require faculty approval before they can book/cancel venues.
Update the frontend read-only gating logic to reflect the new permission rules: Students are always read-only; Student Coordinators are read-only until verified; Faculty is not read-only.
Add a Faculty-only frontend dashboard/tab to manage Student Coordinator verification requests (view pending requests and approve/reject them).
Display verification status in the Profile dashboard for Student Coordinators (e.g., "Pending faculty approval" vs "Verified") and ensure the label is accurate after faculty actions.
Update the shared frontend/backend type bindings and React Query hooks to support the new role and verification fields without modifying immutable hook/provider files.
